title: Lucky Blocky
description: Adds a Lucky Block to the game
body:
# **This Datapack adds a Lucky Block to the game**


Once you break the block, you will get a random lucky drop.
this can be good or bad



## **The Crafting Recipe**

![Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d54a7fda345e90f6e05e6b3755d71389d8206f05.png)





![Sand is falling on you](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bb87f9b5d679475ca81da5be6ede449fe90f5aa7_0.webp)

![Lucky dungeon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f6f8139e08207bb42d5a85b8884e98c8b1c2d891_0.webp)
![chaos](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a00f1453b4f7e8eb2394b04486003d1d8054dd29_0.webp)


![thunder rune being used](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/63496659ff3ff791982d259042decb2f31ef2ba0_0.webp)

![Lucky Block in Plains](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9d5e08c93867c70c6ae29447baf88e0fc8b94edc.png)


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
### Important Commands
Give Lucky Block:
```
/function luckyblocky:give_luckyblock
```

Give all the custom items you can get:

```
/function luckyblocky:give_items
```
